negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_059
prompt: The video opens with a close-up shot of a small, round cake with white frosting, placed on a silver cake stand. The cake is beautifully decorated with sliced strawberries, kiwi, blueberries, and a sprig of mint on top. A person's hand, wearing a white sleeve, is seen sprinkling thin, slivered almonds over the side of the cake, adding a crunchy texture and visual appeal. The hand moves gracefully, carefully placing each almond slice, ensuring even coverage. The background is slightly blurred, showing a kitchen setting with a stove and some flowers, suggesting a homey atmosphere. The scene captures the meticulous process of decorating the cake, highlighting the contrast between the creamy white frosting and the vibrant fruit toppings. By the final frame, the cake is fully adorned with almonds, complementing the colorful fruit decorations, and the scene remains focused on the cake, showcasing the completed decoration.
